    Overview

    Overview.Rmd

    Overview

    GiottoDB is a module in the Giotto Suite ecosystem that provides database support for core Giotto functionality through the dbverse.

    overview.png

    GiottoDB function support

    The following non-exhaustive list of functions show which core Giotto functions are supported by GiottoDB objects:

    Constructors

    Saving and Loading

    Subcellular

    Expression

    Dimension Reduction

    Clustering

    Visualization

    Dynamic Method Dispatch

    While GiottoDB provides scalable database-backed methods of core Giotto functions, it does not natively support all of Giotto’s functionality.

    Performance

    Benchmark can be found at the benchmarks vignette.

    Developed by Edward C. Ruiz, Timur Rizvanov, Jiaji George Chen, Ruben Dries.

    Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
